footer.aboutText: To'yxonaTop is Uzbekistan's largest online marketplace for wedding banquet halls — helping couples discover, compare, and book the perfect venue.

items.name: Dilnoza & Bekzod
items.quote: We compared over a dozen halls in one evening and found the perfect one for our budget. The photos matched reality exactly!

items.name: Madina & Jasur
items.quote: Contacting the venue owner directly through Telegram saved us so much time. Highly recommend To'yxonaTop to every couple.

items.name: Nilufar & Sardor
items.quote: The filters made it so easy to find a hall with a VIP room and outdoor area within our capacity needs.

items.name: Zarina & Aziz
items.quote: Reading real reviews from other couples gave us the confidence to book without visiting five different halls.

faq.q1: Is it free to browse venues on To'yxonaTop?
faq.a1: Yes, browsing, comparing and contacting venues is completely free for customers — no account required.
faq.q2: How do I list my wedding hall?
faq.a2: Click "List your venue", fill in your business details, capacity, pricing and photos, then submit. Our team reviews every listing before it goes live.
faq.a3: Most listings are reviewed within 24–48 hours.
faq.a4: Yes — every listing shows phone numbers, Telegram, and a website link where available.
faq.q5: Is there a fee for booking through the platform?
faq.a5: To'yxonaTop doesn't charge customers any booking fee. You negotiate and pay the venue directly.
